title: Automations priority
excerpt:
Dears, I have multiple automations for boards, is it possible to prioritize them for execution? 
Thanks for your kind reply

posts.author: StefJ (Stefania)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dears, I have multiple automations for boards, is it possible to prioritize them for execution?
Thanks for your kind reply

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
The new workflow builder allows strict sequencing of multiple automations. Here is a link to a thread / idea to vote for on the same theme

Order of automations on a board Feature requests
Hi would it be possible to group the automations in the overview window by dragging them or changing their order? I have a lot on one board and they are now in order of adding them, which makes it hard to check which automations belong together. Also I am not sure if the order can cause a conflict or if this is sorted in the background. e.g. automation 1 ‘when status a changes move pulse to another board’ and followed by automation 2 ‘when status a changes - set the date in column x’ so it…
